name: Dhruv Nirmal
summary: Data Engineer with 2+ years building scalable data pipelines and analytics systems across enterprise datasets. Designed/deployed 20+ automated ETL pipelines processing millions of transactions monthly, cutting manual reporting effort 40% and improving turnaround 50%. Strong in Python, SQL, workflow automation, ML models, and AI/LLM-driven analytics workflows.

experience.title: Data Engineer
experience.summary: Client-facing analytics consulting; supplier/transaction datasets for enterprise clients across Australia and New Zealand.
bullets: Built and maintained 20+ automated ETL pipelines processing millions of procurement transactions monthly across 5 enterprise clients (Python, SQL, batch files) deployed on Azure-hosted servers with Windows Task Scheduler.
Automated client reporting/analytics workflows (Python, SQL, KNIME), integrating LLM tools (Claude, ChatGPT) to accelerate analytics script development and delivery.
Developed and maintained 16+ Tableau dashboards for procurement/finance teams to monitor supplier spend, track KPIs, and find cost-optimisation opportunities.
Performed anomaly detection on procurement datasets, identifying cost-leakage patterns contributing to ~15% client savings.
Built/deployed client-facing analytics platforms and dashboards across 5 enterprise clients, communicating technical outputs as actionable insights for senior executives.
ml_ai_bullets: Built an ML model to predict chemical consumption for industrial clients, improving production planning and inventory management.
Developed a binary classification model (TF-IDF + Logistic Regression) to categorise transaction descriptions, cutting manual effort 40%.
Built an agentic AI workflow with Claude to auto-generate structured client progress reports from analytics outputs.
Developed a multi-agent data QA validation workflow (5 agents + orchestrator) to validate client datasets prior to delivery.
Implemented an LLM-driven sentiment analysis workflow on sales call transcripts to identify customer sentiment trends.
Built an automated presentation-generation workflow using Claude to convert analytics outputs into PowerPoint decks.

experience.title: Data Engineer Intern
bullets: Built a distributed anomaly detection pipeline in Databricks using PySpark, improving detection accuracy 20%.
Engineered scalable transformation layers to process procurement data in cloud environments.
Deployed a Power BI analytics solution adopted by senior Department of Transport stakeholders.
Presented system architecture and model outcomes to cross-functional stakeholders.

experience.title: Research Data Analyst
bullets: Analysed blast-wave data with statistical models to predict noise levels, improving prediction accuracy 20% and design efficiency of defence equipment.
Filtered noise using Butterworth filter, reducing noise levels 20%.
Compiled findings into a 70-page report using MATLAB and Excel, refining defence equipment designs by 10%.

education.notes: Statistics I/II, Machine Learning, Communicating with Data, Supply Chain Management, High Dimensional Analysis, Web App Development, Applied Forecasting.
Statistics, C, C++, Analog & Digital Electronics, Entrepreneurship, Mathematics I/II/III.

projects.title: Cloud Data Platform with Terraform
highlights: Provisioned full cloud infrastructure with Terraform (S3, IAM, EC2, networking).
Automated data ingestion pipeline from external APIs to Snowflake on Terraform-managed infra.
Modular Terraform patterns for scalable multi-environment deployment (dev/staging/prod).
